title: Admin username/password approval for feedback with approved feedback display on homepage

requirements.text: Ensure the backend stores a hashed or plaintext admin username and password, and the adminLogin function validates credentials and returns an admin token or session that grants permission to approve or reject feedback. The approved/rejected status field on feedback records must be persisted in stable storage.

quotes: Let the person having the username and password approve the feedback

acceptanceCriteria: A call to adminLogin with valid credentials succeeds and returns a success/token response.
A call to adminLogin with invalid credentials returns an error.
approveFeedback and rejectFeedback functions only succeed when called with a valid admin session or credential.
Feedback approval status is persisted across canister upgrades.

requirements.text: In the AdminDashboard, ensure the admin login form (AdminLoginForm) uses the stored username and password credentials for authentication. After successful login, the feedback management tab must list all submitted feedback and allow the authenticated admin to approve or reject each item using inline approve/reject actions.

quotes: Let the person having the username and password approve the feedback

acceptanceCriteria: Visiting /admin shows the AdminLoginForm when not authenticated.
Entering the correct username and password logs the admin in and shows the dashboard.
The feedback tab lists all pending feedback with Approve and Reject buttons.
Clicking Approve marks the feedback as approved in the backend; clicking Reject marks it as rejected.
Inline loading spinners are shown during approve/reject operations.
A success or error toast is displayed after each action.

requirements.text: In the ReviewsSection on the homepage, fetch only feedback items with an 'approved' status from the backend and display them alongside the hardcoded seed reviews. Non-approved (pending or rejected) feedback must not appear in this section.

quotes: show the feedback in the feedback section of the main website

acceptanceCriteria: The ReviewsSection on the homepage displays all approved feedback fetched from the backend.
Pending and rejected feedback items are not shown in the ReviewsSection.
Loading skeletons are displayed while feedback is being fetched.
Newly approved feedback appears in the ReviewsSection after page refresh or query invalidation.

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
All backend logic must remain in the single actor in backend/main.mo.
Only approved feedback must be exposed to unauthenticated homepage visitors.
nonGoals: Internet Identity or third-party OAuth authentication.
Multi-admin role management or granular permissions.
Email or push notifications on feedback approval.
Editing or deleting feedback content by the admin.
